svg.text: Current deployment and target operating model based on this repository and the AWS resources recorded on June 25, 2026.
ALB active in ap-northeast-2a and ap-northeast-2b
Operational AWS services consumed by the Fargate tasks
Amazon ECR stores the container image
Any outage on this instance impacts
CloudFront → ALB origin currently uses HTTP.
Legend: solid arrows = active traffic/runtime dependency · dashed arrows = control plane, deployment, or planned scheduler integration.
